notes: Roman political figure known for rude and insolent behavior in court, mentioned in Cicero's writings and Plutarch's Lives.

docs.title: Life of Cicero
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … another occasion, Vatinius, a man of rude manners and often insolent in court to the magistrates, who had large swellings on his neck, came before his tribunal and made some request, and on Cicero’s desiring further time to consider it, told him that he himself would have made no question
